Your Local Fundraising Coach

Meet Mike Resetar

Proudly serving South Central Pennsylvania as your dedicated Vertical Raise Territory Manager. Mike works hands-on with every program — from kickoff meeting to cash in hand — so you're never doing this alone.

Whether it's sports teams, band, drama, ROTC, or elementary school fun runs, Mike has helped dozens of Central PA organizations raise thousands with zero upfront cost.

  • In-person kickoff meeting with your team
  • Custom fundraising page built for you
  • Blitz launch — full campaign live in 20 minutes
  • Ongoing support from start to final check
📞 717-586-1039 ✉ Email Mike
About the Platform

Elevate Your Fundraising to New Heights

Vertical Raise is the premier online fundraising platform built for schools and organizations across Pennsylvania.

  • 100% online — no handling money, products, or order forms
  • No upfront cost and no minimums — zero risk
  • 99% email deliverability — best in class
  • A4L Student Data Privacy Agreement — 100% safe & secure
  • Detailed admin tracking dashboard
  • Automated follow-up emails at 14, 7 & 2 days remaining
  • Employer donation match — 20,000+ companies
  • Tax deductible donations
View All Fundraiser Types ↗
1 Platform · 3 Fundraising Options

Choose Your Fundraiser Type

Every program is different. We'll help you pick the right option — or combine all three. See all types at verticalraise.com ↗

Online Donor Drive

Our most powerful fundraiser — reach supporters nationwide via email, text & social, fully automated with a personalized page for every participant.

  • Hit-a-Thons, Shoot-a-Thons, Walk-a-Thons & more
  • Personalized page for every athlete or student
  • Automated reminders at 14, 7 & 2 days
  • Employer donation match integration
  • Next-day direct deposit available

Learn More ↗

Gourmet Popcorn

Poplicious handcrafted gourmet popcorn shipped direct to donors. No inventory, no order forms, no stress.

4 Delicious Flavors
Cake Pop Caramel Cashew Cookies & Cream Peanut Butter Cup
  • Drop-shipped direct to every donor's door
  • Sell online and locally simultaneously
  • No cash, no inventory, no order forms
Learn More ↗

Digital Discount Card

A modern upgrade to the old plastic card. Supporters get the Vertical Discounts app — 1,000,000+ GPS-activated deals, good for a full year.

  • Restaurants, entertainment, hotels & more
  • Average 20% savings on hotels
  • Auto-renewals = ongoing revenue for your group
  • Reach supporters locally & nationwide
Learn More ↗
Simple Process

Four Steps to Blast Off

Mike handles the heavy lifting. You focus on your program.

1

Commit

Choose your fundraiser type and complete our quick onboarding form

2

Pre-Launch Meeting

Mike meets your team, builds your custom page, and gets everyone logged in

3

Set Launch Date

Film a quick team video and prepare your full campaign for liftoff

4

Blast Off!

Your entire campaign launches in 20 minutes — watch the donations roll in

The VR Advantage

Why Vertical Raise Wins

Technology, personal service, and local knowledge — all working for your program.

Local Rep · Personal Service

  • Mike Resetar is your dedicated in-person coach right here in Central PA
  • Not a call center or chatbot — real hands-on support
  • Available by phone or text: 717-586-1039

Zero Risk Guarantee

  • No upfront costs — ever
  • No minimums required
  • If you don't raise money, you owe nothing. Period.

Fast Turnaround on Funds

  • Next-day direct deposit available
  • Checks cut within 7–10 days after fundraiser ends
  • Your program gets paid fast — no waiting around

30% More Than Competitors

  • Best-in-class email delivery system (99% deliverability)
  • Proprietary Blitz Launch process for maximum outreach
  • Consistently outperforms every other fundraising platform

Student Data Protected

  • A4L Student Data Privacy Agreement in place
  • No duplicate emails or spam sent to supporters
  • No 3rd party data selling — 100% safe & secure

Spirit Shop Integration

  • Add a custom online spirit shop to any campaign
  • Branded apparel — tees, hoodies, hats & more
  • Boosts your fundraiser total by an additional 10%
Bonus Opportunity

Add a Spirit Shop to Your Campaign

Every Vertical Raise fundraiser can include a fully integrated online spirit shop — giving your supporters a chance to buy custom branded gear while you raise even more money.

Spirit shops are built directly into the Vertical Raise platform. Custom apparel, hats, hoodies and more — all branded for your team or school and available to order online.

  • Fully integrated into your Vertical Raise campaign
  • Custom branded apparel for your team or school
  • Adds an average of 10% to your total fundraiser
  • No inventory — all orders fulfilled and shipped directly
Get Started Learn More ↗
